name: move-better
description: Review task context and prepare a clean handoff for a new independent Codex task.

interface.shortDescription: Review context and prepare a clean task handoff.
interface.longDescription: Review source-task context, decide what to retain or omit, and create a clean handoff for a new independent Codex task.
defaultPrompt: Use $move-better to review this task and prepare a clean handoff for a new independent task.
